latin: Iram meam placare non potes. turba haec pessima Philadelphiae semper consilium habet — et consilium semper fallit. sed numquam culpam suam agnoscunt.

questions.prompt: What always happens to the gang's plans?
What does the gang never do?

translation: You cannot appease my rage. This worst gang in Philadelphia always has a scheme — and the scheme always fails. But they never acknowledge their own fault.
